series_metadata.series_description: Used when the payee has received the warrant and it has been lost, stolen or destroyed. To replace this warrant, an application, and a bond form both must be completed and returned to Business Administration and forwarded to the Auditor of State for the issuance of a new warrant. Original to Auditor of State. Allied Material - Business Administration.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: audit by Auditor of State and audit report is released
